page_title: Groundwork of EVANGELION: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone
text:
is an artbook originally published by GAINAX in April 2008 and later republished by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 31 May 2011. It features the original drawings of the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone.

Overview

Sixteen color pages are present in the release. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000104/
